//: The cross-repo writing + presentation standards as an installable package, so consumers (PANTRY, and post-split any repo) render them from the package via import.meta.resolve('@tjakoen/standards/…') instead of a sibling path. Docs travel inside the package, same mechanism as batch/grain docs. Split destination: BREAD umbrella-root shared docs (SPLIT-PLAN), published at the tjakoen.github.io/standards URL by the portfolio.
name: @tjakoen/standards
description: Cross-repo writing + presentation standards (VOICE, NOTE, README, FIGURES, AI-DEVELOPMENT, SESSION-LOOP, CLAUDE.starter).
author: Tjakoen Stolk <tjakoen.s@gmail.com> (https://tjakoen.github.io)
